title: Hemionitis aiuolae

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties that may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, or used as a tincture, to take advantage of its health benefits.
